session.name: Fix flaky Dropbox test — 5 consecutive green CI runs

recentLoggedRuns.description: First CI run with fix: batch ID mappings in save_files! to prevent transitive collision
CI infra failure: git checkout failed due to .claude/worktrees submodule path in .gitmodules. Not a test failure.
Same CI infra failure on rerun — .claude/worktrees tracked as git submodules breaks checkout
CI run 2 green (also fixed .claude/worktrees blocking checkout)
CI run 3: different flaky test failed (embed_spec.rb:114 - affiliate embed). Not related to our fix.
CI run 4: webpack build failure in CI (empty manifest.json). Not a test failure — CI infra issue.
CI run 5: green (1st consecutive after reset)
